name: rabbit-issue
summary: GitHub Issues wrapper for filing, listing, and lifecycle-managing bugs and enhancements via the `gh` CLI. Replaces rabbit-file's branch-backed bug-and-backlog (B/B) storage with native GH Issues; the rabbit-managed label gates rabbit's automation from touching human-filed issues.
deprecation_criterion: when GH Issues is replaced or the workflow moves to a different tracker; revisit when claude-plugins-official ships a GH Issues skill
spec_no_change_reason: spec amended in prior commit 8f7de4f (Refs #264); this cycle implements code+tests against already-amended spec
